subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou seest how one of Thy chosen ones hath turned towards Thee, detached from all save Thee, holding fast unto the cord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری احد اولیائک اقبل الیک منقطعا عن دونک متمسکا بحبل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
